sourceMovie.title: Gods of Egypt
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Gods of Egypt (2016) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Mummy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Gods of Egypt clicked for you, The Mummy (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Mummy Returns
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Gods of Egypt clicked for you, The Mummy Returns (2001) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Gods of Egypt?
faq.answer: Try The Mummy, The Mummy Returns, Conan the Barbarian—each shares DNA with Gods of Egypt while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Gods of Egypt?
faq.answer: Gods of Egypt (2016) is best described as Action, Adventure, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Gods of Egypt worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
